description:
Create an External/Affiliate product in WooCommerce (http://localhost/wp-admin/) for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. This product type lists the item in your store catalog but redirects customers to an external retailer (Amazon) when they click the buy button. Use the following details:

- Product Name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
- Product Type: External/Affiliate
- Product URL: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09XS7JWHH
- Button Text: Buy on Amazon
- Regular Price: 348.00
- SKU: EXT-SONY-WH1000XM5
- Category: Electronics
- Short Description: Industry-leading noise canceling headphones with Auto NC Optimizer and crystal-clear hands-free calling.
- Description: The Sony WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones offer industry-leading noise cancellation with eight microphones and two processors. Features include 30-hour battery life, crystal-clear hands-free calling, and multipoint connection. Ultra-comfortable and lightweight design with soft-fit leather for long listening sessions.

Admin credentials: admin / Admin1234!
